action_title: Replace OC-001 Wire Rope and Implement ISO 4309 Inspection Standard
action_description: Replace wire rope on OC-001 with manufacturer-specified grade. Update PM card to specify strand count using bore gauge per ISO 4309 Table 6 and define discard criteria before next inspection.
evidence_required: Updated PM card with ISO 4309 discard criteria

action_title: Extend ISO 4309 Discard Criteria to All Site Overhead Cranes
action_description: Audit all 4 overhead cranes on the Chennai site against ISO 4309 discard criteria. Update PM cards for all units. Train maintenance technicians on rope bore inspection technique.

action_title: Retrain Machine Operators on Guarding and Equipment Inspection Requirements
action_description: Retrain all CNC operators on machine guarding and pre-use inspection requirements.

action_title: Fix the Chiller Issue
action_description: Fix the issue.

action_title: Replace PV-012 Shell Course and Implement Post-Process-Change Inspection Scope Review
action_description: Replace corroded shell course section on PV-012. Commission updated inspection scope assessment for all pressure vessels where a process change has occurred in the prior 24 months, assigning localised ultrasonic scan requirements.
evidence_required: Updated inspection scope assessment report for all affected PVs
Next statutory inspection completed and record on file

action_title: Embed Process-Change to Inspection-Scope Link in MOC Procedure
action_description: Update the MOC procedure to require an inspection scope review for any process change that alters fluid chemistry, temperature, or pressure on a pressure system. Brief engineering and EHS teams on the requirement.
evidence_required: Revised MOC procedure with inspection scope review gate

action_title: Ensure All Operators Inspect Equipment Before Use
action_description: Ensure all operators inspect equipment before use.

action_title: Develop Site-Specific Dispatch Bay Segregation Training with Practical Assessment
action_description: Develop a site-specific training module covering the Mumbai Warehouse pedestrian-vehicle segregation layout including the dispatch bay crossing. Include a practical competency assessment. Re-train all forklift operators and record pass/fail.
evidence_required: Revised training content covering dispatch bay layout
All operator training records with practical assessment sign-off

action_title: Install Proximity Warning Alarms on All Forklifts for Pedestrian Zone Entry
action_description: Install proximity alarm systems on all 8 forklifts at Mumbai Warehouse to activate an audible alert when approaching designated pedestrian crossings. Test all units before returning to service.
evidence_required: Test records confirming alarm activation at pedestrian zone
Updated pre-use check form referencing alarm test

action_title: Conduct Refresher Manual Handling Training for All Warehouse Staff
action_description: Conduct refresher training on manual handling for all warehouse staff.

action_title: Ensure Compliance with PTW Authoriser Requirements
action_description: Ensure compliance.

action_title: Update Subcontractor Induction to Verify CISRS Card Type Before Work Commences
action_description: Update the subcontractor induction checklist to require sighting and recording of CISRS card type before any operative is permitted to erect scaffolding. Retain a copy of the card in the contractor file.

action_title: Develop Scaffolding Competency Matrix for All AcerTech Construction Sites
action_description: Develop a competency matrix listing all scaffold system types used on AcerTech construction sites and the corresponding CISRS card requirements. Include in subcontractor pre-qualification documentation.
evidence_required: Competency matrix signed off by Site Manager
Matrix distributed to all site managers
Pre-qualification questionnaire updated to reference matrix

action_title: Retrain Chemical Production Operators on Reagent Label Reading
action_description: Retrain all chemical production operators on reagent label reading.

action_title: Update COSHH Assessment for Substitute Solvent and Brief Operators Before Return to Work
action_description: Commission updated COSHH assessment for the substitute solvent. Update the COSHH register, risk assessment, and operator information sheet. Brief all degreasing area operators before next shift return.
evidence_required: Updated COSHH assessment signed by EHS Manager

action_title: Embed EHS COSHH Review as Mandatory Gate in Chemical Substitution Approval Process
action_description: Revise the chemical substitution approval form to include a mandatory EHS sign-off gate before procurement. Train procurement team on the requirement. Update the chemical management procedure.
evidence_required: Revised approval form with EHS gate

action_title: Brief Supervisors on Deviation Approval Process
action_description: Brief supervisors on deviation approval process.

action_title: Ensure the Quality Hold Process Is Followed
action_description: Ensure compliance with quality hold process.

action_title: Re-Issue MOC Procedure to Operations Supervisors with Practical Workshop
action_description: Re-issue the MOC procedure to all operations supervisors with a covering memo defining the boundary between routine maintenance and formal change. Conduct a 1-hour workshop with case examples.
evidence_required: Distribution record for MOC procedure re-issue

action_title: Implement Shared Temporary Modification Register Visible to Engineering and Operations
action_description: Implement a shared temporary modification register requiring supervisor sign-off for any temporary bypass. Include in monthly safety review agenda. Archive completed entries for 12 months.
evidence_required: Temporary modification register live in system

action_title: Distribute Group EHS Policy to All Site Managers Without Confirmed Receipt
action_description: Distribute Group EHS Policy to all relevant site managers and obtain signed acknowledgement.

action_title: Replace LEV Ductwork Joints with Mechanically-Secured Clamps and Re-Test
action_description: Replace all push-fit duct connections in the degreasing booth with mechanically-secured clamp connections. Conduct LEV re-test to COSHH Regulations Schedule 4 standard within 5 days of repair.
evidence_required: Contractor work order for joint replacement
COSHH Reg Schedule 4 LEV re-test report signed by competent person

action_title: Revise LEV Maintenance Sign-Off to Include Mandatory Duct Integrity Check
action_description: Update the LEV maintenance sign-off form to require a visual duct integrity check of joints, seals, and duct runs as a mandatory item. Brief maintenance technicians on the revised requirement before next scheduled service.
evidence_required: Completed sign-off form from next scheduled service

action_title: Replace Corroded Flange and Implement Corrosion Rate-Based Inspection Intervals
action_description: Replace gasket and flange on PL-007. Commission a corrosion rate calculation for all acid-service flanges on site. Assign differentiated inspection intervals based on corrosion severity class. Schedule highest-severity flanges at 6-monthly intervals.
evidence_required: Corrosion rate calculation report signed by process engineer
Updated inspection schedule for all acid-service flanges

action_title: Extend CUI Assessment to All Insulated Process Lines at Ahmedabad
action_description: Scope all insulated process lines at the Ahmedabad site for CUI risk. Assign inspection intervals based on service environment and insulation type. Document in the process plant inspection register.
evidence_required: CUI risk assessment for all insulated lines
Risk-based inspection intervals approved by Site Engineer

action_title: Remind Operators About Importance of Earth Bonding During Decanting
action_description: Discuss earth bonding requirements with operators.

action_title: Address the Nitrogen Purge System Fault on R-006
action_description: Fix the issue.

action_title: Redesign Tank Farm A Secondary Containment to Achieve 110 Percent Capacity
action_description: Engage structural engineer to redesign bund for Tank Farm A to achieve net capacity of not less than 110 percent of the largest vessel plus 10 percent freeboard. Obtain permitting approval before construction begins.
evidence_required: Building permit or permitting authority approval

action_title: Include Bund Capacity Verification in MOC Closure Checklist for All Future Vessel Installations
action_description: Update the MOC closure checklist to require a bund capacity recalculation as a mandatory sign-off item for any new or modified vessel in secondary containment areas. Communicate change to engineering and EHS teams.
evidence_required: EHS procedure updated to reference bund capacity check

action_title: Complete Overdue Service and Implement Automated Due-Date Tracking for Contractor Services
action_description: Arrange emergency service of all 6 overdue extinguishers within 5 working days. Implement a calendar-based contractor service due-date tracker with automated email alert 30 days before expiry. Assign a named deputy responsible person as backup.
evidence_required: Contractor service certificates for all units
Screenshot of due-date tracker with automated alert configured
Named backup responsible person recorded in tracker

action_title: Extend Due-Date Tracking to All Legally-Required Inspection Activities on Site
action_description: Audit all legally-required inspection activities — fire extinguishers, LEV, electrical, lifting equipment, PRVs — and add each to the due-date tracking system. Review completeness of tracker at next monthly EHS review.
evidence_required: Monthly EHS review minutes confirming tracker reviewed
No overdue items at first tracker review

action_title: Remove Pallets from Emergency Exits and Remind Staff
action_description: Remove pallets from emergency exits and remind staff not to block exits.

action_title: Replace Failed Batteries and Implement Monthly 30-Second Function Tests
action_description: Replace batteries in all 14 failed emergency lighting fittings within 10 working days. Implement monthly 30-second function tests for all fittings as required by BS 5266 Part 1. Assign a named responsible person for each floor zone.
evidence_required: Battery replacement records for all 14 fittings

action_title: Revise Battery Replacement Programme to Use Temperature-Adjusted Intervals
action_description: Identify all emergency lighting zones with ambient temperature above 25 C. Reduce battery replacement interval to 3 years for these zones. Update the maintenance schedule and instruct the contractor.
evidence_required: Temperature survey for all emergency lighting zones
Updated maintenance schedule with temperature-adjusted intervals

action_title: Update Records and Complete Overdue Test
action_description: Update records.

action_title: Reinstall Assembly Point Signs and Monitor Site
action_description: Monitor the situation.

action_title: Train the Team on Wire Rope Inspection
action_description: Train the team.

action_title: Discuss Wire Rope Issue with Maintenance Supervisor
action_description: Discuss with supervisor.

action_title: Shorten PM Interval and Remind Inspectors to Be More Thorough
action_description: Shorten PM interval and remind inspection team to be more thorough.

action_title: Conduct Refresher Training on Wire Rope Inspection
action_description: Conduct refresher training for maintenance technicians on wire rope inspection.

action_title: Remove OC-001 from Service Pending Full ISO 4309 Inspection
action_description: Remove OC-001 from service immediately. Conduct full wire rope inspection per ISO 4309 using bore inspection gauge. Confirm safe condition in writing before returning to service. Arrange hire crane as interim replacement.
evidence_required: ISO 4309 bore inspection report signed by competent person

action_title: Implement ISO 4309-Compliant Condition-Based Wire Rope Management Programme
action_description: Develop and implement a wire rope management programme for all site overhead cranes aligned to ISO 4309. Define discard criteria, inspection method including bore gauge, and frequency. Train maintenance technicians. Link PM cards to programme.
evidence_required: Wire rope management procedure signed off
All crane PM cards updated to ISO 4309 standard
Technician training records for bore inspection

action_title: Install Magnetic Rope Testing Sensor on Two Highest-Utilisation Cranes
action_description: Install a permanent magnetic rope testing sensor on the two highest-utilisation overhead cranes including OC-001. Configure sensor to trigger maintenance alert at 10 percent cross-section loss threshold.
evidence_required: MRT sensor installation certificate for each crane
Maintenance team trained on alert response procedure

action_title: Train Forklift Operators on Pedestrian Awareness
action_description: Train the team.

action_title: Ensure Compliance with Pedestrian Segregation Rules
action_description: Ensure compliance with pedestrian segregation rules.

action_title: Retrain Operators and Issue Formal Warning Notices
action_description: Retrain all forklift operators on pedestrian awareness and issue formal warning notices to operators involved in incidents.

action_title: Conduct Refresher Training and Update Crossing Signage
action_description: Conduct refresher training on pedestrian safety and update crossing signage at dispatch bay.

action_title: Install Physical Pedestrian Segregation Barriers at Dispatch Bay B
action_description: Install Armco-type physical pedestrian segregation barriers along the full forklift route through Dispatch Bay B. Create a single designated pedestrian crossing with drop kerb and tactile paving. Conduct risk assessment for revised layout before reopening.
evidence_required: Photo evidence of completed barriers and crossing

action_title: Audit All AcerTech Warehouse Sites for Pedestrian-Vehicle Conflict Points
action_description: Conduct a pedestrian-vehicle conflict point audit at all 3 AcerTech warehouse sites. Apply the hierarchy of controls assessment to each identified conflict point. Submit findings to Group EHS Manager within 60 days.
evidence_required: Completed audit report for all 3 warehouse sites
Hierarchy of controls assessment for each conflict point
Findings submitted to Group EHS Manager

action_title: Install Forklift-Activated Warning Lights at All Pedestrian Crossings in Delhi DC
action_description: Install a forklift-proximity warning light system at all four pedestrian crossings in the Delhi Distribution Center. System to activate a flashing amber beacon visible from 20 m when a forklift approaches within 5 m of the crossing.
evidence_required: Pre-use check updated to include light function test

action_title: Commission Arc Flash Risk Assessment for All Live Panel Work Locations
action_description: Commission arc flash risk assessment for all identified live panel work locations at Kolkata plant. Specify NFPA 70E-compliant PPE requirements for each task and boundary distances. Brief all electricians before live work resumes.
evidence_required: Arc flash risk assessment signed by electrical engineer
PPE specification for all live panel tasks

action_title: Update Live Working Procedure to Mandate Arc Flash Boundary Establishment
action_description: Revise the site live working procedure to require arc flash boundary establishment as a mandatory pre-work step for any live panel task. Include in the live working permit checklist. Train all permit issuers and performers.

action_title: Implement Written Lift Plan Requirement for All Lifts Above 250 kg
action_description: Revise the crane and lifting procedure to require a written lift plan including load path, exclusion zone, appointed person sign-off, and emergency plan for all lifts above 250 kg. Train appointed persons and crane operators on the revised requirement.
evidence_required: Lift plan template distributed to all appointed persons

action_title: Standardise Lift Plan Template and Distribute to All AcerTech Manufacturing Sites
action_description: Develop a standardised lift plan template covering load weight confirmation, lift path assessment, exclusion zone method, equipment rating check, and emergency de-rigging plan. Distribute to all manufacturing site EHS managers.
evidence_required: Lift plan template finalised and approved by Group EHS
Template distributed to all manufacturing site EHS managers
Group lifting procedure updated to reference template

action_title: Address the Traffic Management Issue on Site
action_description: Fix the issue.

action_title: Revise Management Review Procedure to Define Minimum Outputs and Record Format
action_description: Update the ISO 45001 management review procedure to define minimum agenda items, required documented outputs, and record retention period. Conduct a retrospective structured management review to produce a compliant record for the current year.
evidence_required: Revised management review procedure signed off
Completed management review record for current year
Agenda template and output checklist in use

action_title: Add Management Review Checklist to Annual ISO 45001 Internal Audit Programme
action_description: Add a checklist item to the ISO 45001 internal audit programme to verify management review outputs against the minimum requirement defined in the revised procedure. Audit to be conducted annually in Q1 before the external surveillance audit.
evidence_required: Updated internal audit programme with management review checklist item
Audit schedule confirmed for next cycle

action_title: Review All Overdue CAPAs and Update Records
action_description: Review all overdue CAPAs and update records.
